channel.title: Apollo Client on Adriaan Knapen
channel.description: Recent content in Apollo Client on Adriaan Knapen

item.title: Server Sided GraphQL with Apollo Client
item.description: Server Sided GraphQL with Apollo Client During development of the ClaimR Dashboard I found myself in the position where I wanted to query a GraphQL endpoint from my backend. It’s a NextJS powered project, hence the server sided logic is written in Node. So I started looking around for GraphQL clients but with little success. graphql-request seemed like a match, with what looked like a recent release. However, on closer inspection it’s pretty clear that it’s abandoned, hence not a proper foundation to build a new product upon.
